entry.title: New: Bill 31 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, APPENDIX A, PART II, AFFORDABLE HOUSING FUND, KAIAULU O KUKUIA" The purpose of this bill is to amend the Fiscal Year 2025 Budget by increasing the Affordable Housing Fund by $11,892,593 and adding conditional language appropriating $250,000 for a grant to A0703 West Maui L.P. for off-site infrastructure.

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
